description: From iconic heritage sites to lively pubs and serene lakes, Hyderabad transforms into a mesmerizing destination after sunset. For families, the best places to visit in Hyderabad with your kids include the illuminated Hussain Sagar Lake, the magical light show at Lumbini Park, and the fun-filled Snow World.
search_query: best places to visit after midnight in Hyderabad
title: 10 Iconic Places to Visit in Hyderabad at Night
